name: Sky Race
author: Poki
description: Sky Race is a racing game where the track floats high above the clouds! Compete against opponents in heart-pounding sky races, dodge tricky obstacles, and try not to fall off the edge. Win races to earn coins and upgrade your car for even faster, wilder runs. Ready to take racing to new heights? How to play Sky Race? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Turn: A/D or the left and right arrow key Who created Sky Race? Sky Race is created by AM Games. Play their other games on Poki: Crazy Descent ! How can I play Sky Race for free? You can play Sky Race for free on Poki. Can I play Sky Race on mobile devices and desktop? Sky Race can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
